notes: rule.core.claims-safety spans the deterministic tense check (LINT.TENSE_SLIP, executed live in pre-gate-lint) and the LLM fact-firewall codes (FM.FABRICATION / FM.SUPERLATIVE_UNBACKED / FM.COMPARATOR_RESKIN are HARD; FM.UNVERIFIED_CAUSAL is the one ADVISORY code — non-blocking, Recommended-eligible). The tense cases thread historical_entities into the gate via the case 'rules' block.

cases.name: tense-slip
cases.notes: A [HISTORICAL] entity ('Season One') framed in present-continuous ('is still smashing records right now'). Deterministic, hard. Requires the historical_entities rules input.

cases.name: tense-ok
cases.notes: Same entity framed in the past ('was', 'wrapped earlier this year') — the past-tense saver suppresses the slip.

cases.name: fabrication
cases.notes: Invented falsifiable metrics with no project-context trace.

cases.name: superlative-unbacked
cases.notes: Biggest/best/first/only uniqueness claims with no receipt.

cases.name: comparator-reskin
cases.notes: Comparator proper nouns / campaign pressure copied in as Acme's own.

cases.name: unverified-causal
cases.notes: ADVISORY: a causal link between two individually-verified facts. Non-blocking, rides onto the card, does NOT bar Recommended ⇒ verdict PASS (§14.4 advisory carve-out).

cases.name: fact-safe
cases.notes: Clean control: every claim traces to project-context; no superlative, comparator, or causal overreach.
